queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of checking account balances below zero as a determinant of default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: The impact of the absence of a checking account on credit risk drivers and their contribution to elevated default likelihood.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: no known savings account.
queries.question: Empirical assessment of the absence of known savings accounts as a mitigating factor in credit risk determinants.
